summary: Verified bug fix: hero's 'Driven by Alpha.' now renders visibly with sapphire-blue linear-gradient masked text. Regression checks pass (Built on Research., description, Get Notified, Learn More).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hero fix verified via Playwright. Inner span with inline-style linear-gradient(90deg,#5B92F5,#437EEB,#1F5FD0), WebkitBackgroundClip 'text', WebkitTextFillColor transparent renders at 906x136 px, in viewport. Screenshot confirms visible blue gradient text.
rca of the issue: Original Tailwind class 'text-transparent bg-clip-text bg-gradient-to-r' was not producing a gradient background (likely purge/order issue in build), so text was transparent with no gradient fill = invisible. Fix uses inline style guaranteeing background-image + -webkit-background-clip:text + -webkit-text-fill-color:transparent regardless of CSS layer. Verified computed styles match expectations.
